name: From Lecture Hall to Battlefield
original_name: Từ Giảng Đường Đến Chiến Trường
overview: Documenting the history of Vietnam, the lines about the war are more than the lines about peace. War is also a part of the nation's fate, as well as the fate of every person in the country enslaved by foreign invaders. The fate of the generation of students who were born and raised during the war was the same, and history gave them as well as the entire youth class at that time the mission to end the war. They, in many different ways, directly or indirectly, sooner or later received that mission with all the enthusiasm of their youth who lived, studied, trained, upheld patriotism and tradition. student revolution in Vietnam.

trailers.title: 81 ngày đêm tại chiến trường thành cổ Quảng Trị đánh với thuỷ quân lục chiến
